name: BExcellent Group Holdings Limited
summary: BExcellent Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides private supplementary secondary school education in Hong Kong. It operates private supplementary secondary school education services for students from secondary 1 to secondary 6 under the Beacon College brand; and private secondary day school services to secondary 4, 5, and 6 level students under the Beacon Day School brand. The company also provides various ancillary education services and products, including interview preparation, language and supplementary primary school education, and tutorial and consultation services under our Diverse Learning Club, Beacon Childhood, BeConfident, Glocal Education, and Mathgic brands; mock examination, VIP self-study, and online course scheduling and management services; IELTS, general interest, and foreign language courses under the Beacon BExcellent brand; higher national diploma in business under the Beacon CAPE brand; other education services Ascent Prep brand name; overseas study consultation services under GES brand; and online retail business under Beacon Living brand name. In addition, it offers childhood education services; and information technology services, as well as operates advertising agency. As at 31 July 2020, it operated 17 teaching centers with a total of 131 classrooms. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. BExcellent Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Beacon Enterprise Limited.
